calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-01-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Sky Billiards, Inc.
Off Calendar Aug-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, Gregory Yoder of the law offices of Gregory Yoder APC (949-334-7184) appears as counsel for defendantnon-opposing party, Sky Billiards, Inc.

No other appearance is made in this matter.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Sky Billiards, Inc. is GRANTED. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Written order and judgment are signed and filed in open court.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Woodstream Corporation
Off Calendar Jul-05-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of Consent Judgment As To Defendant Woodstream Corporation.Plaintiff Ecological Rights Foundation's motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement as to defendant Woodstream Corporation is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and Judgment signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 711, ckaren@sftc.org =(302/HK)
